calendar.matters:
PETITION To Invalidate Power Of Attorney And To Order Charlotte Ray English To File An Acounting
Off Calendar Jun-04-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gerald Stokes for Petitioner.

Mr. Stokes stated that the party in interest passed away and requested withdrawing the petition, which was granted by the Court. The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Maria Lertora CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aquino.
